text.title: Two-Pass: Free-Form Reasoning Then Structured Extraction Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the task median difficulty score (1-5)?

conclusion.verdict: single-pass strict SO is sufficient; do NOT deploy two-pass

branch.question: Is the latency budget < 1 second total?

conclusion.verdict: reject; two calls always exceed sub-second budget — push schema downstream into a separate pipeline

branch.question: A/B delta on 50+ tasks: two-pass minus single-pass accuracy?

conclusion.verdict: deploy two-pass: pass-1 strong + thinking, pass-2 Haiku strict SO
keep single-pass; record the negative result

text.example: difficulty=4 → q-latency: 5s budget → q-ab-delta: 12% delta → two-pass-required. Opus + 16K thinking pass 1, Haiku temperature=0 strict SO pass 2.
